mapper.sql: select id, storage_code, storage_type, applicant_id, applicant_name, applicant_dept_id, applicant_dept_name, apply_date, business_status, proc_inst_id, proc_def_id, total_amount, asset_count, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from asset_storage
mapper.select:
and storage_code like concat('%', #{storageCode}, '%')
and storage_type = #{storageType} and applicant_name like concat('%', #{applicantName}, '%')
and business_status = #{businessStatus}
order by create_time desc

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN s.proc_inst_id IS NULL OR s.proc_inst_id = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS draft, SUM(CASE WHEN s.proc_inst_id IS NOT NULL AND t.ID_ IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending, SUM(CASE WHEN s.proc_inst_id IS NOT NULL AND hpi.END_TIME_ IS NOT NULL AND hv.BOOLEAN_ = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN s.proc_inst_id IS NOT NULL AND hpi.END_TIME_ IS NOT NULL AND hv.BOOLEAN_ = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected FROM asset_storage s LEFT JOIN act_ru_task t ON s.proc_inst_id = t.PROC_INST_ID_ LEFT JOIN act_hi_procinst hpi ON s.proc_inst_id = hpi.PROC_INST_ID_ LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT PROC_INST_ID_, BOOLEAN_ FROM act_hi_varinst hv1 WHERE hv1.NAME_ = 'approved' AND hv1.ID_ = (SELECT MAX(ID_) FROM act_hi_varinst hv2 WHERE hv2.PROC_INST_ID_ = hv1.PROC_INST_ID_ AND hv2.NAME_ = 'approved')) hv ON s.proc_inst_id = hv.PROC_INST_ID_ WHERE s.del_flag = '0'
